(Amended) Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arb Award; Index
Off Calendar Jul-11-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS'S (AMENDED) NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.
Appearances: Conchita Lozano-Batista of Weinberg Roger & Rosenfeld (510.337.1001) for petitioner and moving party. No other appearances, although Ms. Lozano-Batista indicated she received notice of respondent's intent to argue (matter called at 10:08 am). The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted, no opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
